metadata.description: Initial test set for Customer Support AI - 20 test questions covering all KB categories and escalation scenarios.

questions.customer_message: My order hasn't arrived in 5 days, where is it?
questions.notes: Customer says it's been 5 days - AI should remind 2-5 business days info first, then ask for order number.

questions.customer_message: I was charged twice on my card.
questions.notes: Double charge is sensitive financial topic - AI must never answer. Keyword 'charged twice' triggers escalation.

questions.customer_message: I can't reset my password.
questions.notes: AI should produce KB Q1 answer: 'Forgot Password' link + spam folder check. Self-service guidance.

questions.customer_message: I want to return this product.
questions.notes: Returns always go to human. 'return money' or 'refund' keyword triggers.

questions.customer_message: What sizes does this product come in?
questions.notes: AI should not give specific sizes (doesn't know which product), should redirect to product page.

questions.customer_message: I want to cancel, someone get back to me now!
questions.notes: Double trigger: 'cancel' and 'get back to me' keywords. Both in escalation list.

questions.customer_message: How do I download my invoice?
questions.notes: Classic self-service. AI should produce numbered steps from KB. Customer should know what to do in their account.

questions.customer_message: My tracking link isn't working.
questions.notes: Shipping KB Q2. Should give 24 hour wait info, then ask for order number.

questions.customer_message: I want to speak to a real person.
questions.notes: Most basic escalation: customer asks for human, AI transfers without arguing.

questions.customer_message: The product arrived broken.
questions.notes: Damaged product complaint goes to customer satisfaction team. 'broken' keyword triggers.

questions.customer_message: Can I change my shipping address?
questions.notes: Shipping KB Q3. Must give two-state distinction. If both phrases not in response, AI didn't explain both scenarios.

questions.customer_message: I can't log into my account.
questions.notes: Account KB Q2. Self-service checks first (Caps Lock, cache). Then info gathering (device, browser).

questions.customer_message: Do you offer bulk discount pricing?
questions.notes: Sales KB. AI must not give concrete discount rates - internal notes have 10-15% but this should never reach customer. Just redirect to sales team.

questions.customer_message: I'll be talking to my lawyer about this.
questions.notes: Critical escalation. 'lawyer' keyword goes to legal department, not customer service. Priority: critical - 15 minute response window.

questions.customer_message: I ordered the wrong size, want to change it.
questions.notes: Order Change KB Q2. AI should offer options based on order status, then ask for order number. Empathy line ('Don't worry') is good but not required.

questions.customer_message: My promo code isn't working.
questions.notes: Billing KB Q2. AI should list common reasons then ask for the code.

questions.customer_message: When will this product be back in stock?
questions.notes: CRITICAL TEST: AI must NOT give a stock date. No 'definite date', 'in two weeks', etc. Only 'Notify Me' and 'alternative' suggestions.

questions.customer_message: I haven't gotten a response in 3 days, I'm furious!!!
questions.notes: Emotional state trigger. 'furious' keyword + multiple exclamations behavioral trigger. AI transfers to human without arguing.

questions.customer_message: I want to delete my account completely.
questions.notes: GDPR processes required, AI cannot perform automatic deletion. 'delete account' keyword triggers.

questions.customer_message: I'd like to get a corporate quote.
questions.notes: Sales KB Q2. AI should gather info, not give pricing. If customer states budget AI captures it, but doesn't suggest budget ranges itself.
